description_full: 🎨 Cover: impressionist depiction of a moment from June 19, 1821. Event: Decisive defeat of the Filiki Eteria by the Ottomans at Drăgășani (in Wallachia). Quick context: Filiki Eteria or Society of Friends was a secret political and revolutionary organization founded in 1814 in Odessa, whose purpose was to overthrow Ottoman rule in Greece and esta… Trivia: Related: Filiki Eteria • Source: Wikipedia (On This Day)
